mapper.select: SELECT id, step_id, method, url_template, protocol_type, content_type, body_format, charset, timeout_ms, follow_redirect, config_json, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by, deleted FROM step_request_config WHERE step_id = #{stepId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE step_request_config SET method = #{method}, url_template = #{urlTemplate}, protocol_type = #{protocolType}, content_type = #{contentType}, body_format = #{bodyFormat}, charset = #{charset}, timeout_ms = #{timeoutMs}, follow_redirect = #{followRedirect}, config_json = #{configJson}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
